creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #1)

I guess the problem with my environment is that I'm transitioning it from Python 2 to Python 3. Adding python=3.6 to DEFAULT_VERSIONS after you already have lang/python installed is apparently going to do bad things:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/Mk/Uses/python.mk?view=markup#l320

This will return 2, since I had lang/python installed at the time. I guess it needs to go the other way so that my system doesn't build lang/python as python2, because I think that's what it intends to do:

kevans91@gemini:~/dev/ports/lang/python$ make -V RUN_DEPENDS
python2:lang/python2 /usr/local/bin/python2.7:lang/python27
